title: Village Farms International Inc (VFF) Analyst Ratings and Estimates
text: 8 Wall Street analysts provided a forecast with an average price target of 5.02 USD, implying a price increase of 93.63% compared to current price of 2.59. VFF has received 4 Buy Ratings with average analyst price target of 4.63 over past 3 months. Consensus rating of Moderate Buy based on 2 buy ratings, 0 hold ratings, 0 sell ratings. Analysts project EPS of $0.03 for next earnings report expected on 08/10/2026. Next quarter sales forecast for VFF is $56.32M with range of $56.10M to $56.70M. Next quarter earnings estimate is $0.02 with range of $0.01 to $0.02. Major capacity expansions in Canada and Netherlands underway, supporting positive outlook for 2026 and beyond.
